title: Review: jmap correctness and space_set atomicity
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — two correctness bugs (P0 + P1) around existence checks for empty/member-only patches; the core atomicity fix and validation logic are sound.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: not running the test suite locally, not checking the relay/ws.rs typing phantom implementation to confirm the synthesis is actually in the disconnect path. Would raise confidence if: test suite runs clean, and I trace the typing_notify synthesis from relay disconnect to broadcast.
